prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile shows a DIFFERENT huge towering object as the clear MAIN SUBJECT — prominent, detailed and standing tall, on only a small low patch of pale sandy beach. The object dominates and fills the tile; keep the ground base minimal and thin — NOT a tall dirt pedestal or block with a small object on top. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a giant saguaro cactus 2) a colossal sea-stack rock 3) a weathered stone obelisk in the sand 4) a tall stilted beach lighthouse 5) a towering coconut palm 6) a massive driftwood sculpture 7) a giant windswept palm 8) a grand carved tiki totem 9) a tall cluster of palms 10) a tall beached ship's mast with a tattered sail. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
